response: convert the initial tax calculation for the art collection begins by applying the 5% discount to the 20% rate, resulting in a 19% effective rate on the $2 million valuation. convert the real estate tax is computed by applying 10% to the first $1 million, 15% to the next $2 million, and 20% to the remaining $2 million of the $5 million total. convert the securities tax liability is determined by subtracting the $100,000 charitable deduction from the $3 million value before applying the 15% rate. convert the sum of these three calculated amounts yields a total initial tax liability of $1,340,000. convert the real estate valuation must be increased by 10% to reflect the actual market value, bringing the new total to $5.5 million. convert the revised real estate tax is now calculated with 10% on the first $1 million, 15% on the next $2 million, and 20% on the remaining $2.5 million. convert the new total tax liability for the entire estate, incorporating the corrected real estate figure while keeping other assets unchanged, equals $1,440,000.
